items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: From Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道：Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司将 AI 能力从代码生成延伸到 PRD 验证、code review 等更早的研发治理阶段。这是行业趋势报道，涉及 AI 治理层（如 PRD 评审、design input 校验），但未给出具体 API/SDK 字段变化。属于方法论层面的动向，对你现有 CI/CD、code review 流水线可作为演进参考。
items.backend_focus: 工程参考：可在现有 CI 中加入 AI-based PRD/设计文档校验步骤；如果你已在用 LLM 做 review，关注是否需要新增 structured output（response_format）来约束评审结果格式。暂无需迁移任何现役 OpenAI/Anthropic SDK 版本。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: 微软 Build 2026 上 Azure Kubernetes Service（AKS）新增 Bare Metal、Fleet Management 与面向 AI 训练/推理的基础设施能力。这是 AKS 平台层升级，不是 OpenAI/Anthropic API 变化；影响在 Azure 上跑自建模型推理或训练的工作负载，涉及 Kubernetes 版本与节点池配置需调整。
items.backend_focus: 若你在 AKS 上自建推理：评估 Bare Metal 节点池是否适配你的 GPU/加速卡驱动，关注 AKS Fleet 的多集群管理与网络策略；非 AKS 用户无影响，无需行动。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 设备本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，兼容 PyTorch 转换模型与预优化开源模型。这是 Apple 平台级 SDK 更新，对此前用 Core ML 做端侧推理的工程需要规划迁移，但工具链允许复用 PyTorch 权重。
items.backend_focus: iOS/macOS 工程：把 Core ML 集成代码迁移到 Core AI，关注模型转换 API 变化（如新的 PyTorch converter 路径）、新的 on-device runtime 接口；如已用预优化开源模型（如 Llama 变体），需验证 Core AI 是否支持其格式。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 发布 Chunk Sidecars，将 CI 风格校验直接嵌入 AI 编码 Agent 的内层开发循环。这是 CI/Agent 编排层的新能力，让 Agent 在生成代码后立即触发隔离环境的测试运行；属于第三方工具集成，不影响 OpenAI/Anthropic/Claude SDK 本身，但若你已在 CI 中跑 AI agent 任务，可显著缩短反馈链。
items.backend_focus: 在现有 CI pipeline 中启用 CircleCI Chunk Sidecars，给 AI agent 调用加独立隔离执行环境；如已有自研 agent runner，可参考其 sidecar 模式做架构对齐。无需改动 LLM API 字段或 SDK 版本。

items.title: Anthropic Releases and Temporarily Suspends Claude Fable 5
items.original_summary: On June 9, 2026, Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, a model designed for long-horizon tasks, but it was taken offline shortly after due to a U.S. government export directive. It shares architecture with Claude Mythos 5, supporting extensive token usage. The model includes mandatory data retention requirements, which have affected its deployment with partners like Microsoft. By Andrew Hoblitzell
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 于 2026-06-09 发布 Claude Fable 5（面向长时任务），与 Mythos 5 共享架构并支持大规模 token 使用，但上线后不久即因美国政府出口管制指令被强制下线，且模型附带强制数据留存要求影响与微软的合作。这是模型可用性与合规层面的剧烈变化，相对此前 Sonnet/Opus 系列，Fable 5 在长任务与 token 容量上有扩展，但现已全面下线。已迁移到 Fable 5 的应用必须立即回退。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把所有 claude-fable-5 调用回退到 claude-opus-4-8 或稳定的 Sonnet 版本；清理任何依赖 Fable 5 超大 context window 的 prompt；关注 Anthropic 关于数据留存与微软合作的进一步说明，避免合规风险。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How It Happens and How to Detect It
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 长文：解析 ML 模型投毒（data poisoning）的发生路径、检测与防御手段，涵盖 label flipping、backdoor、clean-label、gradient manipulation 等攻击面。这是安全/MLOps 知识性内容，不涉及任何具体 API、SDK 版本、模型发布或定价变化。对已有训练 pipeline 的工程可作为安全审计参考。
items.backend_focus: 安全加固参考：在训练数据接入层加入异常分布检测与 provenance 追踪；审查现有 dataset 校验流程是否覆盖 label flipping/clean-label 场景。无需改动 LLM API 集成或 SDK 版本。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: a Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 长文：在云环境下治理 AI 的实践指南，覆盖影子 AI 发现、数据分类、IAM 强制、policy-as-code 与运营控制。这是架构与治理方法论，不涉及具体 OpenAI/Anthropic API 字段或 SDK 变更。对在云上跑 AI 服务的团队可作为治理实施参考。
items.backend_focus: 架构参考：把 policy-as-code（如 OPA/Sentinel）接入 AI 调用网关，对 prompt/输出做敏感数据脱敏；为影子 AI 发现接入统一 API 网关日志。无需改动现有 LLM SDK 版本或 model 字段。

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.original_summary: Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers. The service is presented as a way to close what the company calls the Ephemeral Intelligence Gap, where agents repeatedly rediscover the same fixes and patterns in isolation instead of sharing them through a common memory. By Matt Saunders
items.chinese_summary: Stack Overflow 发布 Stack Overflow for Agents Beta，面向 AI 编码 Agent 提供 API-first 知识交换服务，用于解决 Agent 反复孤立解决同一问题的 "Ephemeral Intelligence Gap"。这是第三方数据/检索 API 上线，提供新的知识接入端点，但本身不改变 OpenAI/Anthropic SDK 接口；如你的 Agent 需要复用社区已有修复模式，可对接。
items.backend_focus: 在 AI Agent 工具链中加入 Stack Overflow for Agents API 作为 fallback 知识源；关注其 rate limit、auth 模型与知识覆盖范围；不要把它替代现有 vector DB/RAG，而是作为补充。无需改动 LLM SDK 版本。

items.title: Oracle's OpenJDK Bans Generative AI Contributions While Oracle's GraalVM Allows Them
items.original_summary: Two related, Oracle-backed projects published opposing policies on open-source contributions created with generative AI: the OpenJDK Governing Board approved an interim policy prohibiting such contributions, while the Coding Assistants policy from GraalVM permits them. Both projects require contributors to sign the same Oracle Contributor Agreement (OCA) for intellectual property. By Karsten Silz
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道：Oracle 旗下 OpenJDK 通过临时政策禁止生成式 AI 贡献，而 GraalVM 同期政策允许生成式 AI 贡献，两项目共用同一 OCA 协议。这是开源治理/合规层面的分歧，对使用 OpenJDK 或 GraalVM 的工程团队意味着不同的代码贡献规则，但不影响 OpenAI/Anthropic API 或 SDK 本身。
items.backend_focus: 如果你向 OpenJDK 上游提 PR，需关闭 AI 辅助生成流程；GraalVM 相关贡献可继续使用 AI 助手。无需改动 LLM API/SDK 集成；建议在内部贡献规范里同步这两条政策的差异。
